DSCR note: A debt service coverage ratio above 1.25x is generally required by SBA lenders. The DSCR should be calculated against trailing twelve-month cash flow (EBITDA minus owner adjustments).

Period Payment Principal Interest Balance
§ 04Sensitivity Analysis

Impact of interest rate changes on monthly payment and total interest over the life of the loan.

Scenario Rate Monthly Payment Total Interest DSCR Impact
Base case{{interestRate}}{{monthlyPayment}}{{totalInterest}}{{dscr}}
+100 bps{{ratePlus100}}{{paymentPlus100}}{{interestPlus100}}{{dscrPlus100}}
+200 bps{{ratePlus200}}{{paymentPlus200}}{{interestPlus200}}{{dscrPlus200}}
-100 bps{{rateMinus100}}{{paymentMinus100}}{{interestMinus100}}{{dscrMinus100}}
Model assumptions: All scenarios assume level amortization over the full term. Actual payments may vary based on rate reset provisions, prepayment activity, or SBA fee adjustments.
